extracted_claim: There is a dent along the side of my car on the door panel area.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed car panel (door) is visible from an angle where surface marks and deformation can be assessed in image 2.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 clearly shows a significant dent and associated scratches on the rear door panel of the vehicle, consistent with the customer's claim of a dent on the door panel area.
